steps.title: Match compound verbs
steps.content: The singular subject "This technique" has a compound predicate: it "emphasizes" one thing and also does something else. The second verb should stay parallel with the third-person singular present-tense verb "emphasizes."

steps.title: Keep tense and number parallel
steps.content: B uses plural "have" and shifts tense, C uses plural "are" and shifts to progressive form, and D uses a base-form verb that does not agree with the singular subject. The answer is A.
